# hash-utils-ai-mcp
# Hashing, UUID, and ID generation tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install
```bash
pip install hash-utils-ai-mcp
```

## Auth & Rate Limits
- Free tier: 10 calls/day. No API key required.
- Pro tier (£79/mo): unlimited + signed attestations.
- Enterprise (£1,499/mo): white-label.

## Tools

### `hash_text`
Hash text using various algorithms.

### `verify_hash`
Verify if a text matches an expected hash.

### `generate_uuid`
Generate UUID(s) of various versions.

### `generate_nanoid`
Generate nanoid-style short unique identifiers.


## Maintainer
MEOK AI Labs · hello@meok.ai · https://meok.ai · MIT licensed

## Pairs with
Governance moat: pair this tool with any of MEOK's 38 governance MCPs (EU AI Act, DORA, NIS2, CRA, GDPR, ISO 42001, etc.) for full compliance coverage.
